rationale.R1.3: The agent output thoroughly audits each load-bearing claim against the evidence, identifying multiple instances where claims exceed evidence.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags some uncertainties (e.g., small sample size in user study) but could more comprehensively disclose uncertainty across all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays strictly within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content introduced; identifies potential harms in original claims.
rationale.RX.5: Major points are well-supported, but some minor edits lack explicit traceability to sources.
